title: About 12% of US teens turn to AI for emotional support or advice
description: General-purpose tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok are not designed for this use, making mental health professionals wary.
content: General-purpose tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Grok are not designed for this use, making mental health professionals wary.
